message:
fix(freeze): fix sharded compilation linking and arena allocator safety

- Use extern fn declarations in shards instead of importing native_dispatch
  to prevent duplicate symbol errors when compiling shards separately
- Add isArenaPointer() guard in arena allocator to safely ignore
  frozen/static pointers that don't belong to the arena
- Tighten LIFO optimization bounds check with HEADER_SIZE offset to
  prevent integer underflow on pointers near block start
- Remove export keyword from frozen_reset_call_depth_zig to avoid
  duplicate symbol when zig_runtime is imported by multiple shards

This fixes LLVM TU explosion by allowing 738 shards to compile as
separate object files (~200KB each) instead of one 138MB+ module.
